content.title: Tom Lee's BitMine Posts $3.8 Billion Quarterly Loss Due to Ethereum Price Plunge
content.summary: Leading Ethereum treasury firm BitMine Immersion Technologies posted a major loss thanks to unrealized losses on its ETH.

content.title: eToro Acquires Self-Custody Crypto Wallet Firm Zengo for $70 Million
content.summary: The deal signals eToro's strategic push into self-custody solutions amid growing demand for non-custodial crypto infrastructure.

content.title: Pakistan Lifts 8-Year Crypto Banking Ban Following Trump Family, Binance Deals
content.summary: Banks in Pakistan can now provide services to registered crypto firms—but not trade crypto themselves—after a 2018 ban was rescinded.

content.title: Online Casino Operator's Stock Surges on Crypto.com Prediction Market Deal
content.summary: Shares in High Roller Technologies nearly doubled Tuesday after the firm announced it was entering the prediction markets space.

content.title: 'Nothing Ever Happens': This Bot Always Bets 'No' on Polymarket, And It Has a Point
content.summary: Sterling Crispin's 'Nothing Ever Happens' bot automatically buys "No" on every non-sports Polymarket it finds. It's not that crazy.

content.title: New Bitcoin Proposal Would Freeze Coins to Counter Quantum Threat
content.summary: The proposal would phase out Bitcoin's original security methods and freeze coins that don't move in time.

content.title: Can AI Beat the Sports Betting Market? 8 of the Top Models Tried
content.summary: KellyBench put Claude, GPT-5, Gemini, and Grok through a full Premier League season of betting. Not one turned a profit. Here's why.

content.title: Allbirds Stock Spikes 400% on Pivot From Shoe Brand to AI Compute—Yes, Really
content.summary: Sustainable footwear company Allbirds will rebrand as NewBird AI and enter the GPU-as-a-service market. Investors love the pivot.

content.title: Elizabeth Warren Warns Elon Musk's X Money Threatens 'Stability of the Financial System'
content.summary: The Massachusetts Senator warned of consumer protection gaps as Musk's payment platform launches amid weakened federal oversight.

content.title: Morning Minute: The Next Fed Chair Has a Crypto Portfolio
content.summary: Kevin Warsh is holding Solana, Polymarket and more. Goldman Sachs is filing for a BTC ETF. And Circle stock is jumping on news of a token.
